symptom: Frontend route returns client-side 404 'Page not found' despite being documented as Attendance self-service. /attendance (index) works, /attendance/my missing page component.
expected: Attendance my page with check-in/out CTA
evidence: body text '404 Page not found The page you're looking for doesn't exist'

symptom: Builder page shows 'Workflow not found' error state instead of empty canvas for new workflow. No create/new workflow experience via this route without a workflow id.
expected: Builder canvas loads with ability to design a new workflow
evidence: h1='Workflow not found', no canvas/reactflow DOM

symptom: SuperAdmin-only tenants admin page returns client-side 404. Missing route/page component for multi-tenant admin console.
expected: Tenants list/admin page visible to SUPER_ADMIN
evidence: h1='Page not found'

symptom: Audit logs admin page returns client-side 404. Compliance/audit trail not reachable via UI.
evidence: h1='Page not found'

title: Route /attendance/my returns 404 Not Found
expected: My Attendance page renders (listed in sidebar MY SPACE)
evidence: h1=Page not found, hasNotFound=true

title: Route /leave/balance returns 404 Not Found
evidence: h1=Page not found

title: Route /payroll/my-payslips returns 404 Not Found
expected: My Payslips page (listed in MY SPACE sidebar)
evidence: h1=Page not found, hasNotFound=true

title: Route /payroll/settings returns 404 Not Found
evidence: h1=Page not found, hasNotFound=true

title: GET /api/v1/analytics/dashboard returns 403 for SUPER_ADMIN
evidence: network log: /api/v1/analytics/dashboard -> 403 on every dashboard load

title: /performance/360 returns 404 (sidebar 360 Feedback link broken)
evidence: Page renders '404 Page not found' for HR_MANAGER. Menu entry '360 Feedback' points at missing route; other /performance/* routes render correctly.

title: /performance/training returns 404
evidence: Page renders '404 Page not found' for HR_MANAGER. Sidebar 'Training' link under NU-GROW is broken. Likely actual route is /training or /learning.

title: /performance/surveys returns 404
evidence: Page renders 404 for HR_MANAGER. Sidebar 'Surveys' link broken. Actual route may be /surveys.

title: /performance/recognition returns 404
evidence: Page renders 404 for HR_MANAGER. Sidebar 'Recognition' link broken. Actual route may be /recognition at top level.

title: Four NU-Grow sidebar links broken (360/training/surveys/recognition)
evidence: Under /performance/* namespace, 4 of 7 canonical sub-routes return 404 (360, training, surveys, recognition). Only /performance, /performance/reviews, /performance/okr render. Sidebar advertises these routes even though pages are not mounted or live at different paths.

title: RECRUITMENT_ADMIN sees Access Denied on /recruitment/jobs despite backend returning 200 for all recruitment APIs
evidence: Page body shows 'Access Denied - You don't have permission to access this page'. /api/v1/auth/me=200 [RECRUITMENT_ADMIN,REPORTING_MANAGER]. job-openings, candidates, interviews APIs return 200.

title: POST /auth/refresh 401 loops trigger redirect to /auth/login while backend session still valid
repro: Navigate recruitment pages as RECRUITMENT_ADMIN; observe POST /auth/refresh 401 every ~minute causing occasional /auth/login redirect
evidence: 5 console errors: POST /auth/refresh 401. Tab bounced to /auth/login?returnUrl=/recruitment although /auth/me still returns 200 suresh@nulogic.io.

title: Renderer freeze after successive recruitment route navigations (CDP Runtime.evaluate timeout 45s)
file_hint: frontend recruitment pages data-fetch side effects (possible runaway React Query retries on 401 refresh loop)
repro: Login, navigate /recruitment -> /recruitment/jobs -> /recruitment/candidates. Third nav frequently causes tab renderer to become unresponsive.
evidence: Chrome MCP CDP sendCommand Runtime.evaluate timed out after 45000ms on tab 1283664352 twice. Coincides with /auth/refresh 401 loop.

title: /orgchart route returns 404 Page not found
evidence: Navigated to http://localhost:3000/orgchart — page renders Next.js not-found.tsx (404 Page not found). No /orgchart frontend route exists.
expected: Org chart page should render or redirect to an org-chart implementation
notes: FAIL — missing route, not a permission issue

title: Page shows empty state instead of permission error when backend returns 403
evidence: GET /api/v1/assets → 403. Page renders 'Total Assets 0' with 'Add Asset' button visible
expected: Show Access Denied gate OR hide Add Asset CTA when user lacks permission
actual: Empty-state UI implies no assets exist; misleads user
notes: UX/permission-gating bug. Same pattern on /overtime and /contracts

title: /overtime renders UI despite 403 on list endpoint; CTAs exposed
evidence: GET /api/v1/overtime returns 403, but page renders 'Request Overtime' button and tabs
expected: Access Denied page or hide action CTAs
actual: Full UI with empty state shown
notes: Inconsistent vs /shifts which shows Access Denied gate

title: /contracts renders full UI + 'New Contract' CTA despite backend 403
evidence: GET /api/v1/contracts returns 403; page shows 'No contracts found' with 'New Contract' button
expected: Access Denied gate or hide New Contract CTA
actual: Empty state with creation CTA visible
